qualityGates: Use live GitHub or local repo state before acting.
Preserve dirty worktrees and avoid parent repos/ pushes.
Close stale semantic PRs; merge small cleanly rebasable PRs.
Prefer focused validation commands over broad destructive sweeps.
If disk drops below 10 GiB free, pause implementation work and prune stale target directories only when no cargo/rustc processes are active.

stories.title: Harvest safe fleet PRs
stories.description: Survey KooshaPari org PRs, merge small safe dependency/governance PRs, close stale superseded semantic PRs, and record blocked PRs with exact reasons. Do not touch archived/blocklisted repos unless the PR is clearly dependency-only and mergeable.
acceptanceCriteria: Live PR list checked with gh or GitHub app.
Only safe mergeable PRs merged or stale superseded PRs closed.
Blocked PRs are reported with repo, PR number, and blocker.

stories.title: Resume AgilePlus P0 test triage
stories.description: Resume the AgilePlus pre-push failure lane from the interrupted session. Focus first on the duplicate /api/v1/stream route panic in agileplus-api integration tests. Preserve current dirty spec edits and avoid broad formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: AgilePlus scoped instructions and dirty state reviewed.
Narrow fix or clear no-op conclusion produced.
Focused cargo test/check command run or exact blocker recorded.

stories.title: Watch scheduled post-lockfile Dependabot surfacing
stories.description: Check whether the newly committed Cargo.lock and dependabot.yml changes have generated new PRs. Merge clean dependency updates and document repos that still have visibility gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: Recent Dependabot PRs checked across lockfile-committed repos.
Clean dependency PRs merged when safe.
Visibility gaps documented with repo and ecosystem path.

stories.title: Maintain pause and status protocol
stories.description: Respect the 4:30 AM MST pause checkpoint and the existing iMessage notification. If the checkpoint is reached or STOP exists, stop cleanly and leave a concise status summary.
acceptanceCriteria: STOP file checked before any new cycle.
4:30 AM MST pause checkpoint respected if reached.
A concise status summary is appended to the activity log.
